The agency-in-a-box

Agency-grade marketing, with a human at the wheel.

AI does the production. A named human partner owns the judgement. You own the work from day one.

Tell us about your business See the 3D outputs

The agency is too much. The tool stack is not enough.

Most growing businesses are stuck between two bad options. Maxxim is the third.

The traditional agency

Senior thinking, but slow, expensive and opaque. Months of process before anything ships, and a retainer that never ends.

DIY AI tools

Fast and cheap, but the work lands back on you. A pile of prompts and drafts becomes a second job, with nobody accountable.

Maxxim, the agency-in-a-box

AI production speed with a named human's judgement, quality and sign-off. Finished outcomes you own, delivered in days.

Finished outcomes, not a pile of prompts.

Maxxim does not hand you suggestions to finish yourself. Every engagement produces working assets with a job to do:

  • A diagnosis of your market, customer and offer
  • Strategy, messaging and brand direction you sign off
  • Build-ready briefs for every channel that matters
  • A launched, professionally designed website
  • Reporting, review and an optimisation backlog

Every output has a job. Every phase has a checkpoint. Everything is yours.

The 3D Process

Discover. Design. Deploy. Then it learns.

A structured intelligence process, not a workshop and a wish. Each phase produces real outputs, and each phase ends at a gate you approve.

Diagnosis

Discover

We diagnose the market, customer, offer and current constraints so the strategy is grounded in evidence.

19 output types · approved at CP1

Strategy

Design

We turn the discovery into strategy, messaging, brand direction, plans and briefs that can be built from.

40 output types · approved at CP2

Delivery

Deploy

We launch the approved work, manage the activity, report on performance and improve what is working.

31 output types · approved at CP3

Once the system is live, Deploy feeds back into Discover. Performance, client intelligence and proof sharpen the next cycle, so the strategy, website, content, campaigns and CRM keep getting better instead of going stale.

See the 3D outputs

AI does about 80 percent. A human owns the rest.

The 20 percent a machine cannot own is exactly the part clients pay for.

AI runs the repeatable production, at speed
A human owns the rest

What the engine does

Research synthesis, drafting, design production, build work, variants and volume. The repeatable work that used to consume an agency's junior floor, done in hours.

What the human owns

Reading your business correctly. Judgement calls. Quality. The decision that something is right, and the name that stands behind it at every gate.

✓
“I've checked this; it will work.”

A named partner signs off at every gate.

Yours from day one.

The strategy, the website source and every asset are handed to you as they are approved. Human checked. Partner approved. Client owned.

For partners

Keep the relationship. We carry the production.

Agencies and consultants run Maxxim as the delivery engine behind their client relationships: the same 3D outputs, briefs and reporting, delivered under your standard and your sign-off.

How partnering works →

Fair questions.

Is this just AI doing my marketing?

No. AI runs the repeatable 80 percent of the production at speed. A named human partner owns the 20 percent that matters: judgement, quality and sign-off. Nothing ships until a person has put their name on it.

What do I actually receive?

Structured outputs with a job to do: a diagnosis of your business, a strategy and messaging set, build-ready briefs, a launched website and the assets around it, then reporting and an optimisation backlog. The full library is 90 output types across three phases.

Who owns the work?

You do, from day one. The strategy, the website source and the assets are handed to you as they are approved. No lock-in, no hostage-taking, no ransom for your own work.

How fast is it?

Days, not months. Value lands at every checkpoint, not only at the end. You see real work at CP1 before you commit to anything further.

What does it cost?

Less than an agency retainer, more than a stack of tools. Scope, deliverables and price are agreed in writing before any work begins, so there are no surprises.

What if I already have a marketing person or agency?

Maxxim also runs as the delivery engine behind agencies and consultants. You keep the relationship and the standard, we carry the production. See the partner page for how that works.

See what the method produces before you commit.

Tell us about your business and we open Discover. You review real work at the first checkpoint, then decide.

Tell us about your business

The agency-in-a-box. The proven method, run by a human, at AI speed. Discover, Design, Deploy, then the system learns and the next cycle gets sharper.
